app.name: MyLoo
app.live_status: iOS in Apple review (expected through within days), Android paused

brief.headline: MyLoo
brief.tagline: Privacy-first digestion tracker with AI Bristol classification and 30-day clinic export.
brief.what_it_is: MyLoo is a digestion and stool tracker for iOS (Android launch on hold due to Google's Health Policy 2026). Photo of the sample, Claude Vision AI classifies on the Bristol Stool Scale 1-7, plus volume / texture / blood / mucus flags. Privacy-first: photos are NOT stored on our side, only the structured result lives in the timeline. The timeline carries symptom tags (bloating, cramps, urgency, pain level), and the user exports a clean 30-day PDF for their GI appointment.
brief.who_for: Adults dealing with IBS, IBD, gut sensitivities, food intolerances, post-surgical follow-up. Plus parents tracking toddler health (adult-audience targeting only for now), and chronic-condition patients (coeliac etc.). Creators who sit well: gut-health educators, IBS-day-in-the-life accounts, low-FODMAP food channels, post-gastro-surgery journals, patient-advocate IBS/IBD pages.
features: Photo-to-Bristol AI classification: Vision model returns Bristol 1-7 + volume / texture / blood / mucus flags from a single photo.
Privacy-first photo handling: image is processed in the Vision call and not persisted on Klar infrastructure, only the structured result lives in the timeline.
Symptom tags timeline: bloating, cramps, urgency, pain level on a simple scale, cross-tagged with food entries.
30-day clinic PDF export: handed to GI at appointment, replaces 4 weeks of retrospective recall.
Email-inbound parsing mode (Premium): off / warranty-only / all — parses incoming lab or food-sensitivity test PDFs into the timeline.
Discreet clinical UI: deliberately calm visual identity, not the wellness-influencer aesthetic that drives away patients with real conditions.
business_model_lines: Single revenue stream: recurring Premium subscription.
Pricing: 4.99 USD / month or 29.99 USD / year.
Free tier: manual Bristol entry + tags, timeline, manual PDF export.
Premium unlocks: AI photo classification, email-inbound scanning, extended clinic export mode.
Platform note: iOS only currently. Android paused since Jan 2026 — Google Health Policy now requires registered org account + D-U-N-S verification, personal accounts are blocked at policy review.
brief.why_this_works: Gut-health content has explosive engagement on TikTok and Instagram, and the audience is genuinely seeking and willing to try new tools. MyLoo's clinical-calm visual identity is a real differentiator from the wellness-influencer aesthetic that dominates the category and feels untrustworthy to people with real conditions. AI Bristol classification is a feature most competitors do not have, which gives creators a concrete demo moment. Word-doc tracking is the reality for ~80% of IBS patients today — MyLoo solves exactly that switch.

en.subtitle: for patient advocates and gut-health creators
en.hero_quote: Photo in, AI classifies, clinic PDF out. Privacy-first. Earn from the value you already create.
en.sixty_seconds_intro: MyLoo is a digestion / stool tracker for iOS (Android launch on hold due to Google's Health Policy 2026). Photo of the sample, Claude Vision AI classifies on the Bristol Stool Scale 1-7, plus volume / texture / blood / mucus flags. Privacy-first: photos are NOT stored on our side, only the structured result lives in the timeline. The timeline carries symptom tags (bloating, cramps, urgency, pain level), you export a clean 30-day PDF for your GI appointment.
en.why_this_works: Word-doc tracking is the reality for 80% of IBS patients. MyLoo solves exactly that problem: at the GI appointment you no longer talk retrospectively for 4 weeks, you show a PDF with real data.
free_vs_premium: Free: manual entry (Bristol picker + tags), timeline, manual PDF export.
Premium (4.99 USD/month or 29.99 USD/year): AI photo classification + email-inbound scanning + extended clinic export mode.
Email scanning mode: off / warranty-only / all — controls what MyLoo automatically parses from your mail inbox.
Free Lifetime Premium for onboarded affiliates (no posting obligation).
audience_fit_good: Patient advocates IBS/IBD (IG, 10k-80k, very high conversion).
Patient advocates DACH #reizdarm (IG / TikTok, 5k-50k, high reply rate, smaller market).
audience_fit_poor: Wellness-influencer aesthetic (audience over-promised by other tools).
Generic lifestyle accounts without a gut-health angle.
Children's-health audiences — V2, different compliance bracket.

reel_hooks.label: Faceless content (privacy by design)
items: Screen-recording only "From Word doc to clinic PDF in 2 minutes" — 30s app screen, scroll timeline, photo add, AI classification, export PDF preview.
Animation Bristol scale 1-7 — 15s animation that ends with "the test your GI would do in 30 seconds, you do it daily".
Voiceover over stock footage — 45s, stock stomach pain / belly / calendar, voice: "I've had IBS for 8 years, here's what changed my GI appointments."
Comparison slide "What you did before MyLoo" — split-screen, left: word-doc chaos, right: MyLoo timeline. 8s loop.
Patient-journey storyboard carousel — 4 slides (Day 1 / Day 14 / Day 30 / appointment 4 min instead of 25).

reel_hooks.label: UGC / your voice (patient-advocate trust)
items: "Day in my life with IBS" with MyLoo as a 5-second beat 1x — 60s vlog format.
"Before my GI appointment I do this" — 45s selfie + app PDF export.
Personal diagnosis story (90s, high-trust format) — MyLoo appears at the end as "what would have helped me".
Patient-advocate Q&A story / reel series — "5 questions from my DM audience about MyLoo".
Co-creation with another patient advocate (duet on TikTok, carousel on IG).

story_ideas: Education story: Bristol scale infographic + sticker "the only tracking that actually helps your GI" + link sticker.
Social proof: PDF export screenshot, caption "this is what I hand my GI now, instead of guessing".
Direct ask: selfie story, "use my link, get 1 month Premium free" + link sticker.
carousel_ideas: "5 apps every IBS patient needs" (MyLoo on slide 1 or 2, no hard sell).
"My GI appointment routine in 5 slides" (slide 6 = affiliate link in caption).
"Why I stopped tracking in a Word doc" (problem-to-solution carousel).
en.posting_cadence: Patient-advocate audience: 1 high-trust reel per week is plenty, more is fine but not required. Best engagement IG: Tue + Thu 7-9pm CET. TikTok: Mon-Wed evenings work best for educational gut-health content. Always pair a reel with a 24-hour story including the link sticker — that brings ~40% of the conversions.
en.conversion_math: Micro patient advocate (15k IG, 1 reel): 8,000 views x 1.8% CTR = 144 clicks, 35% install = 50 installs, 8% Premium = 4 subs, 14 months x 4.99 USD x 50% = ~140 USD per reel. Mid-tier patient advocate (80k, 1 reel): 40,000 views x 1.5% CTR = 600 clicks, 30% install = 180 installs, 8% conv = 14 subs, ~490 USD per reel. MD/RD endorsement (300k, 1 carousel): reach 100,000 x 0.8% CTR = 800 clicks, 25% install = 200 installs, 9% conv = 18 subs, ~625 USD per post. IBS apps have above-average conversion because the alternative (Word doc / nothing) is genuinely bad.
tracking_model_lines: Your link myloo.org/i/[yourhandle] works on IG bio, TikTok bio, story sticker, carousel caption.
Android: Google Play install referrer (deterministic) — once Android is unblocked.
iOS warm: Universal Link opens the app with handle.
iOS cold (~99% of creator traffic): signed-token clipboard deferred-deeplink, end-to-end verified via Wavelength.
Privacy add-on: on first open the user sees a one-tap "Invited by @[yourhandle]? Yes / No" confirmer — consent over silent attribution. Most confirm immediately.
RevenueCat webhook fires on Premium purchase, 50% credited for 24 months.
onboarding_steps: Click the personal link from Mail 2 (valid 7 days).
Fill in: handle, Wise payout details, country (tax docs), billing address.
Free Lifetime Premium activated immediately on your MyLoo account.
Dashboard at getklar.org/dashboard via magic link.
dashboard_lines: Installs split (Android / iOS-warm / iOS-cold) once channels are open.
Active Premium subs in your bucket.
Claimable + paid + carry-over + next payout date + refund holdback pipeline.
en.brand_assets: Logo, app screenshots, Bristol-scale infographics, B-roll footage and ready-made caption snippets: getklar.org/i/myloo/brand-assets (link goes live with your onboarding mail).
faq: Privacy-first — can I honestly say this?

Yes. Photos are NOT stored on our side. Only the structured result (Bristol classification, tags) lives in the timeline. Vision call runs in the EU edge function, photo is processed and not persisted.
Medical claims?

NEVER. MyLoo is a tracking tool, not a diagnostic device. Do not say "the app diagnoses IBS", say "the app helps you track symptoms structurally for GI conversations". Violation = legal risk for you and us.
Disclosure duty?
Yes. Rev-share = paid recommendation. #ad / #sponsored / IG "Paid Partnership". DACH: UWG §5a disclosure mandatory.
Can I get a flat fee on top?
Mid+ yes, 200-500 USD per reel negotiable. Book the 15-minute intro call.
Can I also mention MyLoo for kids / babies?
Not currently. Children's health is V2 phase, different compliance bracket. Please target adult audiences only.
What if Premium pricing changes?
You continue to earn 50% on the then-current price.

de.subtitle: für Patient-Advocates und Gut-Health-Creator
de.hero_quote: Foto rein, KI klassifiziert, Klinik-PDF raus. Privacy-first. Verdien an dem Wert den du eh schon stiftest.
de.sixty_seconds_intro: MyLoo ist ein Verdauungs- und Stuhl-Tracker für iOS (Android-Launch on hold wegen Google-Health-Policy 2026). Foto vom Sample, Claude-Vision-KI klassifiziert nach Bristol-Stuhl-Skala 1-7, plus Volumen / Textur / Blut / Schleim-Flags. Privacy-first: Fotos werden NICHT gespeichert auf unserer Seite, nur das strukturierte Ergebnis lebt in deiner Timeline. Die Timeline trägt Symptom-Tags (Blähungen, Krämpfe, Urgency, Schmerz-Level), du exportierst eine saubere 30-Tage-PDF für deinen GI-Termin.
de.why_this_works: Word-Doc-Tracking ist die Realität bei 80% der IBS-Patient:innen. MyLoo löst exakt das Problem: vor dem GI-Termin nicht 4 Wochen retrospektiv reden, sondern eine PDF mit echten Daten zeigen.
free_vs_premium: Free: manuelle Eingabe (Bristol-Picker + Tags), Timeline, manueller PDF-Export.
Premium (4,99 USD/Monat oder 29,99 USD/Jahr): KI-Foto-Klassifikation + Email-Inbound-Scanning + erweiterter Klinik-Export-Mode.
Email-Scan-Mode: off / warranty-only / all — kontrolliert was MyLoo automatisch aus deinem Mail-Postfach parst.
Free Lifetime Premium für onboarded Affiliates (kein Posting-Zwang).
audience_fit_good: Patient-Advocates DACH #reizdarm (IG / TikTok, 5k-50k, hohe Reply-Rate, kleinerer Markt).

reel_hooks.label: Faceless Content (Privacy by Design)
items: Screen-Recording-only "Vom Word-Doc zum Klinik-PDF in 2 Minuten" — 30s App-Screen, Timeline-Scroll, Foto-Add, KI-Klassifikation, Export-PDF-Preview.
Animation Bristol-Skala 1-7 — 15s Animation die endet mit "den Test den dein GI in 30 Sekunden machen würde, machst du täglich".
Voiceover über Stock-Footage — 45s, Stock-Material (Bauchschmerzen / Kalender), Voice: "Ich habe IBS seit 8 Jahren, hier ist was meine GI-Termine verändert hat".
Comparison-Slide "Was du vor MyLoo gemacht hast" — Split-Screen, links: Word-Doc-Chaos, rechts: MyLoo-Timeline. 8s Loop.
Patient-Journey-Storyboard-Karussell — 4 Slides (Tag 1 / Tag 14 / Tag 30 / Termin 4 min statt 25).

reel_hooks.label: UGC / Deine Stimme (Patient-Advocate-Trust)
items: "Day in my life with IBS" mit MyLoo als 5-Sekunden-Beat 1x — 60s Vlog-Format.
"Vor meinem GI-Termin mache ich das" — 45s Selfie + App-PDF-Export.
Persönliche Diagnose-Story (90s, High-Trust-Format) — MyLoo kommt am Ende als "was mir geholfen hätte".
Patient-Advocate Q&A Story- oder Reel-Serie — "5 Fragen aus meinen DMs zu MyLoo".
Co-Creation mit anderem Patient-Advocate (Duet auf TikTok, Carousel auf IG).

story_ideas: Education-Story: Bristol-Skala-Infografik + Sticker "das einzige Tracking das deinem GI wirklich hilft" + Link-Sticker.
Social-Proof: PDF-Export-Screenshot, Caption "das hand ich jetzt meinem GI, statt zu raten".
Direct-Ask: Selfie-Story, "nutz meinen Link, 1 Monat Premium gratis" + Link-Sticker.
carousel_ideas: "5 Apps die jede:r IBS-Patient:in braucht" (MyLoo Slide 1 oder 2, kein Hard-Sell).
"Meine GI-Termin-Routine in 5 Slides" (Slide 6 = Affiliate-Link in Caption).
"Warum ich aufgehört habe in Word-Doc zu tracken" (Problem-to-Solution-Karussell).
de.posting_cadence: Patient-Advocate-Audience: 1 High-Trust-Reel pro Woche reicht völlig, mehr OK aber nicht nötig. Beste Engagement-Zeiten IG: Di + Do 19-21h MEZ. TikTok: Mo-Mi abends funktioniert am besten für Educational-Gut-Health-Content. Immer ein Reel mit 24h-Story + Link-Sticker pairen — das bringt ~40% der Conversions.
de.conversion_math: Mikro Patient-Advocate (15k IG, 1 Reel): 8.000 Views x 1,8% CTR = 144 Klicks, 35% Install = 50 Installs, 8% Premium = 4 Subs, 14 Mo x 4,99 USD x 50% = ~140 USD pro Reel. Mid-Tier (80k, 1 Reel): 40.000 Views x 1,5% CTR = 600 Klicks, 30% Install = 180 Installs, 8% Conv = 14 Subs, ~490 USD pro Reel. MD/RD-Endorsement (300k, 1 Carousel): Reach 100.000 x 0,8% CTR = 800 Klicks, 25% Install = 200 Installs, 9% Conv = 18 Subs, ~625 USD pro Post. IBS-Apps haben überdurchschnittliche Conversion weil die Alternative (Word-Doc / nichts) so schlecht ist.
tracking_model_lines: Dein Link myloo.org/i/[handle] funktioniert auf IG-Bio, TikTok-Bio, Story-Sticker, Carousel-Caption.
Android: Google Play Install-Referrer (deterministisch) — sobald Android wieder freigeschaltet ist.
iOS warm: Universal-Link öffnet App mit Handle.
iOS cold (~99% des Creator-Traffic): signed-Token Clipboard-Deferred-Deeplink, End-to-End verifiziert via Wavelength.
Privacy-Add-on: beim ersten Öffnen sieht User einen One-Tap "Invited by @[handle]? Yes / No"-Confirmer — Consent über Silent-Attribution. Die meisten bestätigen sofort.
RevenueCat-Webhook feuert beim Premium-Kauf, 50% für 24 Monate gutgeschrieben.
onboarding_steps: Klick den persönlichen Link aus Mail 2 (7 Tage gültig).
Du gibst ein: Handle, Wise-Payout-Details, Land (Steuer-Doku), Rechnungsadresse.
Free Lifetime Premium sofort auf deinem MyLoo-Account aktiv.
dashboard_lines: Installs-Split (Android / iOS-warm / iOS-cold) sobald Kanäle offen sind.
Claimable + Paid + Carry-over + nächster Auszahlungs-Termin + Refund-Holdback-Pipeline.
de.brand_assets: Logo, App-Screenshots, Bristol-Skala-Infografiken, B-Roll-Footage und fertige Caption-Snippets: getklar.org/i/myloo/brand-assets (Link wird mit deinem Onboarding-Mail aktiv).
faq: Privacy-first — darf ich das ehrlich behaupten?

Ja. Fotos werden NICHT auf unserer Seite gespeichert. Nur das strukturierte Ergebnis (Bristol-Klassifikation, Tags) lebt in der Timeline. Vision-Call läuft in der EU-Edge-Function, Foto wird verarbeitet und nicht persistiert.
Medical-Claims?

NIEMALS. MyLoo ist ein Tracking-Tool, kein Diagnose-Gerät. Sag nicht "die App diagnostiziert IBS", sag "die App hilft dir Symptome strukturiert zu tracken für GI-Gespräche". Verletzung = Rechtsrisiko für dich und uns.
Kennzeichnungspflicht?
Ja. Rev-Share = bezahlte Empfehlung. #ad / #Werbung / IG "Paid Partnership". DACH: UWG §5a Disclosure zwingend.
Kann ich eine Flat-Fee on-top kriegen?
Mid+ ja, 200-500 USD pro Reel verhandelbar. Buch dafür den 15-Minuten-Intro-Call.
Kann ich MyLoo auch für Kinder / Babies erwähnen?
Aktuell nicht. Kinder-Gesundheit ist V2-Phase, andere Compliance-Klasse. Bitte nur Erwachsenen-Audience adressieren.
Was wenn Premium-Preis sich ändert?
Du verdienst weiter 50% auf den dann aktuellen Preis.
